replacement_contract: Replace predictor/model.best.pt with the server-trained predictor checkpoint.
Replace generator/vae.pt with the server-trained generator checkpoint.
Keep checkpoint feature order, window length, and preprocessing config compatible with scripts/optical-amplifier-fault-discovery/configs/default.yaml.
Optionally replace predictor/threshold_metrics.json and this run_summary.json with the server training metrics.
notes: This directory should contain reusable model artifacts only.
Do not store per-dataset analysis outputs such as hidden_features/, processed_data/, morph_windows.csv, or field_contributions.csv here.
Per-dataset outputs are generated under the input parquet directory or the --output directory.
